basis.founded: 2021 [uncertain] — founded by Umar Ashraf; 50,000+ active traders.
basis.target_market: Active retail traders (day-traders heavy). Multi-asset: stocks, options, futures, forex, crypto. Global with strong North-America community via Discord.
basis.pricing_model: Subscription. Essential $24/mo (annual): full analytics, backtesting, Trade Replay, 3 Playbooks. Pro $33/mo (annual): unlimited accounts, unlimited Playbooks. 500+ broker sync, Zella University education, Discord community.

ai_features.feature_name: Zella AI (conversational, coming soon late 2026) + Zella Insights (per-trade, live) + AI weekly/monthly reports (live) + AI first-import analysis (live)
ai_features.ai_scope: Live: per-trade (Zella Insights on every trade), per-period (AI-powered weekly + monthly performance reports), per-portfolio (AI first-import analysis evaluates complete trade history on first connect). Coming: per-portfolio conversational chat (Zella AI).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid today. Push: per-trade Zella Insights run automatically, weekly + monthly reports auto-generated, first-import analysis runs on connect. Pull (coming): conversational Zella AI Q&A.
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not disclosed; first-import analysis explicitly designed for backlog import (so it benefits from large history) [uncertain].
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not publicly disclosed. Zella AI is marked 'coming soon' with no underlying model named. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: Per-trade insight cards (Zella Insights), scheduled performance reports (weekly + monthly), first-import analysis dossier. Coming: conversational chat. Plus rich structured analytics (50+ reports), trade replay (3 modes).
ai_features.notable_prompts: Zella AI tagline: 'Ask questions, detect patterns, and get personalized trading insights.' Marketed to 'spot blind spots like revenge trading and tilt'. Specific prompt examples not yet published as Zella AI itself is pre-launch. [uncertain]

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: rule-adherence-scored. Playbook is the central paradigm: 'separating the quality of your strategy from the quality of your execution'. Playbooks have Groups, Criteria, and Rules; Tradezella reports how well the trader adhered to Playbook rules and the performance difference between rule-followed vs rule-broken trades.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Partial today. Playbook-level analytics (per-strategy performance, rule adherence) are core. Live AI features (Zella Insights, weekly/monthly reports) are mostly per-trade and per-period; per-playbook AI coaching is implied by future Zella AI but not yet live. [uncertain on setup-level AI depth post-launch]
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes, explicit. Playbook rules can be defined; Tradezella reports 'how well the trader adhered to the Playbook rules and what the performance difference looks like between trades that followed the rules versus those that did not'. Has a 'Rule Adherence Score' blog framework.
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Not advertised as pre-entry AI. Backtester lets users pressure-test strategies historically before going live, but that's strategy-development, not pre-trade-this-specific-setup validation. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: 25+ ready-made strategy templates (community playbooks viewable). Includes named strategies like 'PO3, OTE + ADR Forex Playbook by NBB Trader'. Users can see other traders' strategies and success rates.

privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: $24-33/mo (annual billing). AI features included; no separate AI charge.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Crypto supported across all plans via 500+ broker sync. Specific exchanges (Hyperliquid, Blofin, MEXC) not confirmed in search results; broker support page (tradezella.com/brokersupport) is the canonical list. Bybit very likely; Hyperliquid/Blofin/MEXC unconfirmed. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Stocks, options, futures, forex, crypto. Multi-asset across all tiers.
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Yes — Tradezella explicitly counts partial closes separately: 'Multiple partial exits count separately.' This indicates first-class multi-TP awareness in trade modeling.
crypto_fit.funding_rate_context: Not advertised as fed into AI analysis [uncertain].
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Per-playbook analytics + 50+ reports likely cover setup × session, but explicit 'BOS+FVG London vs NY' auto-report framing not in headline marketing [uncertain].

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: Between surface_metrics and deep_pattern_analysis today. Per-trade Zella Insights + auto weekly/monthly reports + first-import analysis + Spaces (mentor mode) give multi-axis structure, but the deep conversational coaching depth is gated on Zella AI launching.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Tilt and revenge-trading detection are the marketed Zella AI promises. Mistake tracking + playbook adherence already exist. Specific named scores (Tiltmeter, FOMO-tag) not Tradezella's framing.
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: Yes — 'Spaces' (rebrand of Mentor Mode). A trader shares their full journal with a mentor / trading group / accountability partner; mentor views trades in real time, leaves notes, tracks progress.

community.community_driven_ai: Yes for community-shared playbooks: 'view other traders' strategies and see their success rates'. Active Discord community. 25+ ready-made strategy templates shared. Zella University education hub.
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Multiple live AI features (Insights, weekly/monthly reports, first-import analysis); flagship Zella AI conversational chat expected late 2026. Active AI roadmap.
